title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXIV. Relics.
content:
Little Mary Ester,
            Sat upon a tester,
        Eating of curds and whey;
            There came a little spider,
            And sat him down beside her,
        And frightened Mary Ester away.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXIV. Relics.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
